metadata.description: Effectful test cases for hydra.lib.files primitives

literal.string: appendFile after writeFile preserves existing contents
copy with recursive=true duplicates a directory tree
copy with recursive=false on a directory yields an error
copy with recursive=true into an already-existing destination directory succeeds
createDirectory makes a directory that then exists
exists is false for a missing path
listDirectory reports the number of entries
writeFile then readFile round-trips the contents
removeDirectory with recursive=false removes an empty directory
removeDirectory with recursive=false on a non-empty directory yields an error
removeDirectory with recursive=true removes a populated directory
removeFile deletes a file so it no longer exists
rename moves a file to a new path
status reports the type and size of a regular file
status reports directory as the file type
status on a missing path yields an error
Effectful test cases for hydra.lib.files primitives
